content_of_post_to_comment:
So i wanted to replace habit of falling asleep with phone and later waking up with it and starting morning with doomscrolling.

Ofc i tried and failed multiple times, sometimes couldnt fall asleep withouth it, seems i made it a habit for too long.

So as other attempts failed, book reading is too much fun so not really something i like doing before sleep and other hobies and stuff leave me thinking about them and building in my head that sometimes lead to phone or just pain to fall asleep.

And then i tought to maybe replace it with watching something i like, that isnt long but also not to short. And as i like watching anime and didnt have time or rather didnt manage my time well to have time to watch it, why not then watch it before i go to sleep and after i wake up.

So i downloaded anime to my old laptop, connected that old laptop to tv via hdmi, then played one episode using vlc, and i did not pause, stop, rewind, skip anything. I treated that as if im just watching anime show on tv and thats it.

No need to think is this right show, is it funny, is it filler episode, just watch it and immerse myself in it.

Then when episode ends and vlc interface comes back up, disconect hdmi, turn off tv and laptop, lay to bed and fall asleep while thinking about the episode.

Also before episode starts, my phone is connected to carger at desk, and palced in such a way that i cant see it not from bed, not while setting things up and such, notification turned off.

And then after i get up, and maybe go to bathroom and such morning routines, i fire tv/laptop plug hdmi, start next episode, watch it, finish it, turn everything off, diconnect hdmi and from there on starts my day.

Sometimes i dont even end up using phone for most of the day or entire day unless i need it for something. I sleep better, its perfect in morning while im still half asleep and groggy.

And i kinda like that there is slight light at end of each day as there is next episode just around the corner, and also when its time to sleep i know that faster i sleep and better the faster episode comes.

But yea also what animes are chosen are usually older ones and some that i might or consider interesting to watch. But either way, i allow myself to enjoy it and watch it fully and only after watching it completly do i form opinion that its waste of time or its good show or its solid etc.

It reminds me when i was kid and you could only watch that on tv, you dont chose what anime, nor can pause it, skip episode and such. It was bliss to watch it that way, no need to constantly do evaluation of it, just watch it and enjoy.

SO i wanted to share this, for me this made my life better, and also to use less phone, watch more anime.

If you have any question, tought, insight share it.
